job_summary: We are seeking a Junior Data Scientist to join our Data Analytics department in Kuala Lumpur on a Full Time basis. The ideal candidate will have a Bachelor's degree and strong skills in Python, SQL, and Machine Learning. Experience with AWS and Docker is a plus.
responsibilities: Analyze and interpret complex data to derive actionable insights
Develop and implement machine learning models to solve business problems
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into data-driven solutions
Document workflows, models, and findings for transparency and reproducibility
Contribute to the design and optimization of data pipelines
qualifications: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Mathematics, or related field
Strong foundation in Machine Learning concepts and algorithms
Analytical mindset with attention to detail
Excellent communication skills for presenting findings to stakeholders
preferred_qualifications: Familiarity with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)
